no-restricted-syntax.message: Inline queryKey arrays are forbidden. Import { qk } from '@/lib/query/keys' and use the hierarchical factory (e.g. qk.portfolios.list()). Currently 'warn' during incremental migration; will be promoted to 'error' once 153 legacy sites are converted. PLAN-0059-C C-2.
Inline queryKey arrays are forbidden. Import { qk } from '@/lib/query/keys' and use the hierarchical factory. PLAN-0059-C C-2.
Unbounded while(true) loop detected. Add a break condition or use a bounded loop.

PLAN-0071 P1-4: Raw Tailwind color classes (text-amber-*, text-green-*, text-red-*, text-blue-*, bg-green-*, bg-red-*, bg-amber-*, bg-blue-*) bypass the design token system. Use CSS variable tokens: text-positive, text-negative, text-warning, text-accent-ai, bg-positive/*, bg-negative/*, bg-warning/*, bg-accent-ai/*.
PLAN-0071 P1-4: rounded-xl and rounded-2xl are banned. Terminal UI uses --radius (2px, `rounded-[2px]` or `rounded-sm`). Use rounded-none, rounded-sm, or rounded-[2px].
PLAN-0071 P1-4: p-6 (24px) is banned in terminal panels. Max panel padding is p-3 (12px). Use p-1, p-2, or p-3.
